title: Fix Duplicate Edit Report Buttons Appearing on Multi-Select
story: As a DataTools Pro user multi-selecting reports, I want to see only one Edit Report button, so that the interface remains clean and unambiguous.
description: Bug fix: when multi-selecting report rows, three Edit Report buttons appeared instead of one. The duplicate buttons created a confusing interface. The fix ensures only a single Edit Report button is rendered regardless of the number of selected rows.
acceptance_criteria: Only one Edit Report button appears when multi-selecting rows
Button count does not increase with additional row selections
Bulk edit functionality works correctly with the single button
ux_changes: Fixed duplicate Edit Report buttons from appearing when multi-selecting report rows. Only one button is now rendered.
implementation_notes: The button was being appended on each row selection event rather than checking if it already existed.
comment_summary: Ryan reported with screenshots. Balaji fixed and submitted for review.
